name: laviya-mcp-server
description: Laviya AI Orchestration MCP runtime for IDE and agent integrations.
author: kartegagithub

scripts.build: node scripts/clean.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-assets.mjs
scripts.test: tsx --test tests/apiClient.test.ts tests/configSecurity.test.ts tests/contracts.test.ts tests/envelope.test.ts tests/idempotency.test.ts tests/leaseManager.test.ts tests/mcpIntegration.test.ts tests/mcpResult.test.ts tests/redaction.test.ts
